description: Deterministic semantic contract suite for width-compatibility validator behavior in sv_stimuli_quality_gate.

cases.name: equal_width_literal_assign_pass
cases.input: module m; logic [7:0] a; assign a = 8'hFF; endmodule

cases.name: smaller_literal_assign_pass
cases.input: module m; logic [7:0] a; assign a = 4'hA; endmodule

cases.name: overflow_literal_assign_fail
cases.input: module m; logic [3:0] a; assign a = 8'hFF; endmodule

cases.name: overflow_literal_nonblocking_fail
cases.input: module m; logic [1:0] a; always_comb begin a <= 3'b101; end endmodule

cases.name: signed_packed_literal_pass
cases.input: module m; logic signed [2:0] s; assign s = 3'b111; endmodule

cases.name: signed_packed_literal_overflow_fail
cases.input: module m; logic signed [2:0] s; assign s = 4'b1111; endmodule

cases.name: wire_declaration_literal_pass
cases.input: module m; wire [5:0] w; assign w = 6'd12; endmodule

cases.name: bit_declaration_literal_overflow_fail
cases.input: module m; bit [0:0] b; assign b = 2'd3; endmodule
